title: Watchlists
description: Monitor RSS feeds, websites, and forums. Create scheduled monitors to automatically scrape and process content.
offline: Server is offline. Please connect to use Watchlists.
betaDescription: Watchlists is currently in beta. Some features may be incomplete or change.

overview.description: At-a-glance watchlist health, activity, and failure signals.

health.healthyDescription: No recent failed runs and source health is stable.
health.degradedDescription: Some sources or recent runs show failures. Open failed runs to investigate.

onboarding.title: Quick setup
onboarding.pipeline: Add Feed -> Create Monitor -> Review Results

addFeed.title: Add your first feed
addFeed.description: Start by adding an RSS/site source in Feeds.

createMonitor.title: Create your first monitor
createMonitor.description: Pick feeds, then set a schedule with presets.

reviewResults.title: Review results
reviewResults.description: Open Articles for content and Activity for run diagnostics.

quickSetup.title: Guided quick setup
quickSetup.reviewDescription: Confirm your setup, then create your feed and monitor.
quickSetup.created: Quick setup complete. Feed and monitor created.
quickSetup.createdAndRunning: Quick setup complete. Your first run has started.

setupComplete.title: Setup complete
setupComplete.nextRunDescription: Your next monitor run is {{time}}. New content will appear in Articles and Activity.
setupComplete.runNowDescription: Run a monitor from Monitors to generate your first Articles and Activity entries.

guide.title: Watchlists guided tour
guide.completedDescription: Next: monitor Activity for run health and Articles for review triage.

sources.title: 1. Add feeds
sources.description: Add RSS/site sources so monitors have content to fetch.

jobs.title: 2. Create monitors
jobs.description: Define monitor schedules and scopes for your feeds.

runs.title: 3. Check activity
runs.description: Use Activity to inspect run status, logs, and failures.

items.title: 4. Review articles
items.description: Triaging article output keeps your feed review queue clean.

outputs.title: 5. Deliver reports
outputs.description: Use Reports for generated briefings and output verification.

failureHints.auth: Source may require authentication. Verify credentials or access rules.
failureHints.rateLimit: Source is rate-limiting requests. Reduce schedule frequency and retry.
failureHints.timeout: The source request timed out. Retry, or lower concurrency for this source.
failureHints.dns: Source host could not be resolved. Verify the source URL and DNS availability.
failureHints.tls: TLS/SSL validation failed. Verify certificate chain or endpoint URL.
failureHints.network: Source could not be reached. Check connectivity and endpoint availability.
failureHints.unknownEmpty: Open run details to inspect logs and retry.
failureHints.unknown: Open run details to inspect logs and adjust source or filter settings.

next.auth: Verify your login/API key permissions for {{context}}, then retry.
next.rateLimit: Reduce monitor frequency or wait briefly before retrying.
next.timeout: Retry now. If this continues, reduce scope or schedule intensity.
next.network: Check server connection and try again.
next.server: Retry in a moment. If this keeps failing, check server logs.
next.notFound: Refresh the list and confirm the requested records still exist.
next.generic: Retry the request. If the problem continues, review server diagnostics.

opml.label: OPML imports
opml.title: What is OPML?
opml.description: OPML is a portable feed-list format. Import one file to add many RSS or site feeds at once.

cron.label: cron scheduling
cron.title: How cron scheduling works
cron.description: Cron uses five fields: minute, hour, day-of-month, month, and day-of-week.

ttl.label: retention TTL
ttl.title: What retention TTL means
ttl.description: TTL controls how long generated outputs are kept before they expire automatically.

jinja2.label: Jinja2 templates
jinja2.title: Using Jinja2 templates
jinja2.description: Jinja2 lets you loop, branch, and format monitor data into reusable report templates.

claimClusters.label: claim clusters
claimClusters.title: What claim clusters are
claimClusters.description: Claim clusters group similar claims across feeds so monitors can subscribe to related topic updates.

sources.title: Feeds
sources.undoDeleteDescription: Undo restores this feed for {{seconds}} seconds.
sources.undoBulkDeleteDescription: Undo restores deleted feeds for {{seconds}} seconds.
sources.deleteConfirmInUseTitle: Feed is used by active monitors
sources.deleteConfirmInUseDescription: This feed is referenced by {{count}} active monitor{{plural}}. Deleting it may break scheduled runs.
sources.deleteUsageLookupError: Could not verify active monitor usage before deletion.
sources.importDrop: Drop OPML file here or click to upload
sources.importPreviewLookupError: Could not load existing feeds for duplicate checks.
sources.importPreviewLoadingExisting: Loading existing feeds for duplicate checks...
sources.importPreviewSummary: {{ready}} ready, {{duplicateExisting}} existing duplicates, {{duplicateFile}} file duplicates, {{invalidUrl}} invalid URLs, {{missingUrl}} missing URLs.
sources.importPreviewParseError: Could not parse this OPML file. Verify it contains outline nodes with xmlUrl attributes.
sources.importPreviewNothingToImport: No valid feed entries to import.
sources.importFailedCount: {{count}} failed feed{{plural}} ready for recovery actions.
sources.bulkToggleConfirmDescription: {{total}} selected ({{active}} active, {{inactive}} inactive). {{impacted}} will change state.
sources.undoBulkMoveDescription: Undo restores previous group assignments for {{seconds}} seconds.
sources.bulkDeleteConfirmDescription: This will delete {{count}} feeds ({{active}} active, {{inactive}} inactive).
sources.bulkDeleteConfirmInUseSummary: {{sources}} selected feed{{sourcesPlural}} are referenced by {{jobs}} active monitor{{jobsPlural}}.
sources.undoBulkToggleDescription: Undo restores previous feed states for {{seconds}} seconds.

form.name: Name
form.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 200 characters
form.testSourceHint: Runs a quick fetch preview for this feed. Unsaved URL/type edits are tested.
form.testSourceDraftHint: Run Test Feed to validate URL/type connectivity before saving.
form.testSourceRequiresSave: Create this feed first, then run Test Feed to verify reachability.
form.testSourceNoItems: Test completed, but no preview items were returned.
form.testSourceErrorHintForumDisabled: Forum feeds are not enabled yet. Switch type to RSS Feed or Website.
form.testSourceErrorHintYoutube: Use a canonical YouTube feed URL (channel_id or playlist_id) and retry.
form.testSourceErrorHintNotFound: This saved feed no longer exists. Refresh feeds and open it again.
form.testSourceErrorHintNetwork: Check server connectivity, then run Test Feed again.
form.testSourceErrorHintGeneric: Review URL and feed type, then retry. If this persists, check server logs.
form.forumDisabledHelp: Forum monitoring is coming soon. Use RSS Feed or Website for now.
form.tagsHelp: Add tags to organize and filter your sources

groups.title: Groups
groups.parentCycleError: Cannot move a group into itself or one of its descendants.

jobs.title: Monitors
jobs.description: Create monitors that automatically fetch and process updates from your feeds.
jobs.undoDeleteDescription: Undo restores this monitor for {{seconds}} seconds.
jobs.runNowDisabledHint: Activate this monitor to run it manually
jobs.metricsHint: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for scope, filters, and run timing.

form.name: Name
form.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 200 characters
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of what this monitor does
form.scopeRequired: Please select at least one feed, group, or tag
form.scopeRemediation: Select at least one feed, group, or tag before saving.
form.scheduleTooFrequent: Schedule is too frequent. Minimum interval is every {{minutes}} minutes.
form.emailRecipientsInvalidSubmit: Fix invalid email recipients before saving.
form.emailRecipientsRemediation: Remove or correct invalid recipient addresses.
form.presetHint: Presets prefill template and delivery defaults. Structured review groups content into non-overlapping sections for easier scanning.
form.previewLoadError: Could not load sample candidates for this monitor.
form.previewCreateHint: Save this monitor once to load sample candidates for live filter preview.

scope.sourcesHelp: Monitor will fetch directly from selected feeds
scope.groupsHelp: Monitor will fetch from all feeds in selected groups
scope.tagsHelp: Monitor will fetch from all feeds with selected tags

filters.noFilters: No filters configured. All items will be included.
filters.help: Filters determine which items are included, excluded, or flagged during monitor runs. Include filters require at least one match.

hourly.label: Every hour
hourly.description: Runs once each hour at the selected minute.

every6hours.label: Every 6 hours
every6hours.description: Runs four times each day at the selected minute.

daily.label: Daily
daily.description: Runs every day at the selected time.

weekly.label: Weekly
weekly.description: Runs once a week on the selected weekday and time.

schedule.advancedHint: Enable only if presets cannot express the cadence you need.
schedule.tooFrequent: Schedule is too frequent. Minimum interval is every {{minutes}} minutes.
schedule.tooFrequentRemediation: Increase schedule interval to meet the minimum cadence.
schedule.helpSimple: Pick a schedule preset above. You can switch to Advanced cron for uncommon timing patterns.
schedule.helpAdvanced: Cron format: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week. Example: 0 9 * * MON runs every Monday at 09:00.

runs.title: Activity
runs.description: View execution history and logs for your watchlist monitors.
runs.metricsHint: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for run metrics.

detail.title: Run Details
detail.remediationFallback: Open logs and adjust source or monitor settings, then retry.
detail.filteredSampleSummary: Showing {{count}} recently filtered item{{plural}} for quick diagnosis.
detail.filteredSampleHelp: Use this sample with filter tallies below to tune include/exclude rules.
detail.logsTruncatedDesc: Showing the most recent log output.

items.description: Browse scraped feed items and open the selected source content.
items.selectPrompt: Select an item to view its content
items.noUrlHint: This item does not include an original URL.

batch.noSelected: Select one or more items to review.
batch.noPage: All items on this page are already reviewed.
batch.noFiltered: No matching unread items to review.
batch.confirmAllFilteredTitle: Mark all filtered items as reviewed?
batch.confirmDescription: This will mark {{count}} item{{plural}} as reviewed.
batch.failed: Failed to mark items as reviewed.

savedViews.label: Saved views
savedViews.saveDescription: Save the current source, smart feed, status, and search filters.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.nextPrevious: Move to next or previous article in the list.
shortcuts.toggleReviewed: Toggle reviewed state for the selected article.
shortcuts.openOriginal: Open the selected article in a new tab.
shortcuts.refresh: Refresh feeds, article list, and smart counts.
shortcuts.newFlow: Start a new feed flow by opening Add Source.

outputs.title: Outputs
outputs.description: Generated briefings and reports from your watchlist monitors.
outputs.metricsHint: Showing core columns. Use advanced mode for format/run details.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Jinja2 templates for generating briefing outputs.
templates.deleteUsageLookupError: Could not verify active monitor usage before deletion.
templates.deleteConfirmInUseTitle: Template is used by active monitors
templates.deleteConfirmInUseDescription: This template is referenced by {{count}} active monitor{{plural}}. Deleting it may affect scheduled reports.

preview.note: Preview shows rendered markup only; Jinja2 logic is not evaluated.

docs.title: Available Variables
docs.description: These variables are available in your Jinja2 template.
docs.hint: Use Jinja2 syntax: {% for item in items %}, {{ item.title }}, {% if condition %}, etc.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage retention and related topic subscriptions for this watchlist workspace.
settings.unavailableDesc: Could not load server settings. Make sure the server is running.

ttl.title: Output Retention
ttl.note: TTL values are configured on the server.

diagnostics.title: Internal diagnostics
diagnostics.note: Internal diagnostics are enabled for this environment.

clusters.title: Related Topics (Claim Clusters)
clusters.help: Claim clusters group similar claims detected across feeds. Subscribe a monitor to include those cluster updates in briefings.
clusters.selectJob: Select a monitor to manage cluster subscriptions.
